why: Index must be in memory before search operations can be performed

output.console: Index load result with entry count and load time

success_handling.criteria: knowledge.json index file is read from disk, parsed, and loaded into memory as a queryable data structure

error_handling.criteria: knowledge.json does not exist at the expected path
error_handling.action: Trigger index build, then retry load

event.message: Knowledge index not found at {index_path}, triggering rebuild

error_handling.criteria: Index file exists but cannot be parsed as valid JSON
error_handling.action: Trigger index rebuild, then retry load

event.message: Knowledge index is corrupt, triggering rebuild: {parse_error}

decisions.outcome: Trigger index-build flow, then retry load
